headline: Humana Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on April 29, 2026
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., March 30, 2026--Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM) will release its financial results for the first quarter 2026 (1Q26), as well as prepared management remarks (in PDF format), at 6:00 a.m. Eastern time on April 29, 2026. The company will host a live question-and-answer session at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time that morning to discuss its financial results for the quarter and earnings guidance for 2026.
